F

flashInvalid(Coordinate) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
 
fleet - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Board
 
fleetCount - Variable in enum class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.ShipType
 
FleetPlacementThread - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.concurrency
Places the machine player's fleet on a background thread so the JavaFX Application Thread — and therefore the UI — is never blocked while the random placement algorithm runs.
FleetPlacementThread(MachinePlayer, FleetPlacementThread.PlacementReadyCallback) - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.concurrency.FleetPlacementThread
Creates a new fleet-placement thread.
FleetPlacementThread.PlacementReadyCallback - Interface in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.concurrency
Callback invoked on the JavaFX Application Thread once the machine fleet has been placed (successfully or not).
fleetTrayContainer - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
 
FRIGATE - Enum constant in enum class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.ShipType
